description: Create a full-layout Industry 4.0 ecosystem slide with a central industrial process flow and surrounding technology capability callouts for suppliers, manufacturing systems, sensors, AI, big data, cloud, logistics, and customer outcomes.

header.kicker: 3. Digital Transformation – The digital economy is here
header.headline: Industry 4.0 exemplifies this complex industrial ecosystem – New technologies will interconnect and disrupt business

steps.label: Logistics 4.0
steps.sub: Fully integrated supply chain; interconnected systems; perfect coordination

steps.label: Advanced manufacturing systems
steps.sub: Cyber Physical Systems (CPS); numerical command; full automation; totally interconnected systems; machine to machine communication; machine learning

steps.label: Big data
steps.sub: Give sense to complexity; creativity; collaborative manufacturing

steps.label: Artificial intelligence
steps.sub: Intelligent machines; sensing collecting and analyzing data

steps.label: Customer outcomes
steps.sub: Customer & marketing intimacy; flexibility; perfect match with customer's needs with production mass efficiency; on demand manufacturing

steps.label: Cyber security
steps.sub: Stronger protection for internet based manufacturing; technology products with longer life cycle
